elementary.title: A2 Will vs be going to: Future
elementary.content:
📌 Dự đoán (Predictions)
• Will: Dự đoán dựa trên ý kiến cá nhân (I think he'll win).
• Be going to: Dự đoán dựa trên bằng chứng hiện tại (Look at the clouds! It's going to rain).
📌 Quyết định (Decisions)
• Will: Quyết định ngay tại thời điểm nói (I'll buy some bread).
• Be going to: Dự định đã có từ trước (I'm going to visit my mother next month).
📐 Công thức
Will: S + will + V (infinitive)
Be going to: S + am/is/are + going to + V (infinitive)

exercises.q: A: We don't have any bread. B: Really? I ___ some from the shop then.
exercises.opts: 'll get,'m going to get,will to get,get

exercises.q: A: Why do you need to borrow my suitcase? B: Because I ___ my mother next month.
exercises.opts: 'm going to visit,'ll visit,going to visit,visit

exercises.q: I'm really cold. I ___ the heating on.
exercises.opts: 'll turn,'m going to turn,going to turn,turn

exercises.q: Look at those black clouds! It ___ rain.
exercises.exp: Prediction based on evidence -> be going to

exercises.q: I think she ___ a great doctor one day.
exercises.opts: will be,is going to be,is being,be

exercises.q: A: Did you remember to buy the tickets? B: Oh no! I ___ them now.
exercises.opts: 'll buy,'m going to buy,will to buy,buy

exercises.q: We ___ a party next Saturday. Do you want to come?
Watch out! You ___ that vase!
I'm sure you ___ the exam. You studied hard.

I ___ to London tomorrow. I have the tickets.
I think it ___ tomorrow.

We ___ a new car next month. We've already saved the money.
I'm thirsty. I ___ some water.
Look! That car ___ that tree!
I promise I ___ anyone your secret.
exercises.opts: won't tell,am not going to tell,don't tell,not tell

exercises.q: They ___ a new house soon. They are looking at some today.
I think the weather ___ nice at the weekend.
A: What would you like to eat? B: I ___ a sandwich, please.
A: We don't have any bread. B: Really? I ___ (get) some from the shop then.
A: Why do you need to borrow my suitcase? B: Because I ___ (visit) my mother next month.
I'm really cold. I ___ (turn) the heating on.
Look at those black clouds! It ___ (rain).
I think she ___ (be) a great doctor one day.
A: Did you remember to buy the tickets? B: Oh no! I ___ (buy) them now.
We ___ (have) a party next Saturday.
Watch out! You ___ (break) that vase!
I'm sure you ___ (pass) the exam.
A: The phone is ringing. B: I ___ (get) it!
I ___ (travel) to London tomorrow.
I think it ___ (snow) tomorrow.
A: I can't do this exercise. B: Don't worry, I ___ (help) you.
We ___ (buy) a new car next month.
I'm thirsty. I ___ (have) some water.
Look! That car ___ (hit) that tree!
I promise I ___ (not/tell) anyone your secret.
They ___ (buy) a new house soon.
I think the weather ___ (be) nice at the weekend.
A: What would you like to eat? B: I ___ (have) a sandwich, please.

passage.text: Next summer, my family and I {{1}} (travel) to Japan. We {{2}} (stay) in Tokyo for a week. I think it {{3}} (be) an amazing trip. My sister {{4}} (study) Japanese before we go. We {{5}} (visit) many temples. I {{6}} (buy) a new camera for the trip. If it's too expensive, I {{7}} (not/buy) it. We {{8}} (eat) a lot of sushi. I'm sure we {{9}} (have) a great time. I {{10}} (take) many photos.

A: What {{1}} (you/do) this weekend? B: I {{2}} (clean) my apartment. It's very dirty. A: I {{3}} (help) you if you want. B: That's kind! Then we {{4}} (go) to the cinema. A: Good idea. I think the new movie {{5}} (be) very good. B: I {{6}} (check) the showtimes online now. A: Wait, I {{7}} (call) my brother too. He {{8}} (love) that movie. B: Great! I {{9}} (buy) the tickets later. A: We {{10}} (have) a fun day!

Look at the sky! It {{1}} (be) a beautiful day. I {{2}} (go) for a walk in the park. I {{3}} (not/take) my umbrella because I'm sure it {{4}} (not/rain). My friend Sarah {{5}} (meet) me there at 2 PM. We {{6}} (play) tennis. After that, we {{7}} (have) ice cream. I think we {{8}} (be) very tired. I {{9}} (go) to bed early tonight. Tomorrow {{10}} (be) Monday again.

In the future, I think people {{1}} (live) on Mars. Robots {{2}} (do) all the housework. We {{3}} (not/drive) cars anymore. Instead, we {{4}} (fly) small planes. Life {{5}} (be) very different. I {{6}} (be) a scientist. I {{7}} (study) space. My children {{8}} (go) to school on the moon. I hope the world {{9}} (be) a peaceful place. We {{10}} (protect) the environment.

I {{1}} (start) a new job next Monday. I {{2}} (work) in a big office. I {{3}} (meet) my new boss at 9 AM. I think I {{4}} (be) a bit nervous. I {{5}} (wear) my best suit. My wife {{6}} (drive) me to the station. I {{7}} (not/be) late. I {{8}} (learn) many new things. I'm sure I {{9}} (enjoy) it. This job {{10}} (change) my life.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về kế hoạch của bạn cho kỳ nghỉ lễ sắp tới (bạn định đi đâu, đi cùng ai, bạn sẽ tham gia những hoạt động gì và bạn mong đợi điều gì nhất).
writing_prompts.example: Next holiday, I am going to visit my grandparents in the countryside with my younger brother. We plan to stay there for a week and I will probably help them with the gardening and cooking. I am really looking forward to this trip because I want to enjoy the fresh air and quiet atmosphere.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy đưa ra những dự đoán của bạn về cuộc sống trong 20 năm tới (con người sẽ sống như thế nào, công nghệ sẽ thay đổi ra sao và bạn nghĩ mình sẽ làm gì lúc đó).
writing_prompts.example: In 20 years, I think our lives will change completely because technology will be much more advanced than it is today. Robots will probably do most of the housework and people will live in smart houses that can control everything automatically. I believe I will be a successful manager by then.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một dự định quan trọng mà bạn muốn thực hiện trong năm nay (đó là gì, tại sao bạn muốn làm điều đó và bạn sẽ bắt đầu như thế nào).
writing_prompts.example: This year, I am going to learn a new language, specifically Spanish, because I want to travel to South America in the future. I will start by joining an online course and practicing every day for at least thirty minutes. This is an important goal for me to improve my communication skills.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy tưởng tượng bạn vừa trúng một giải thưởng lớn (bạn sẽ làm gì với số tiền đó, bạn sẽ mua gì và cuộc sống của bạn sẽ thay đổi như thế nào).
writing_prompts.example: If I win a big prize, I will buy a new house for my parents and I am going to travel around the world to explore different cultures. This money will change my life significantly because I will also use a part of it to help poor children in my hometown. I will be very happy.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một quyết định nhanh chóng mà bạn vừa thực hiện hôm nay (tình huống đó là gì, bạn đã quyết định làm gì và kết quả ra sao).
writing_prompts.example: Today, I suddenly realized that I didn't have anything for dinner, so I decided I will go to the supermarket right after work. I bought some fresh vegetables and chicken to cook a healthy meal for myself. This quick decision helped me avoid eating fast food and I felt much better.

elementary.title: A2 Present continuous for future arrangements
elementary.content:
📌 Cách dùng
Dùng để nói về các kế hoạch đã được sắp xếp cụ thể (thường là với người khác, đã chốt thời gian và địa điểm).
• Example: I'm meeting Sally at 7. (Chúng tôi đã hẹn nhau).
🔗 Dấu hiệu nhận biết
Thường đi kèm các trạng từ chỉ thời gian tương lai: tomorrow, next week, at 8 PM...
📐 Phân biệt với 'Be going to'
• Present Continuous: Nhấn mạnh vào sự sắp xếp (Arrangement).
• Be going to: Nhấn mạnh vào dự định (Intention).

We ___ dinner at that new restaurant on Friday.

___ you ___ anything this weekend?

They ___ a party for his birthday on Saturday.
I ___ my grandparents this Sunday.
What ___ you ___ for dinner tonight?
We ___ to the beach tomorrow morning.

I ___ (fly) to New York tomorrow morning.
We ___ (get) married next July.
I ___ (see) the dentist after class.
What time ___ you ___ (leave) tomorrow?
I ___ (take) the 6:50 train tomorrow morning.
I ___ (go) for a drink with Jessica this evening.
She ___ (meet) her friends tomorrow.
We ___ (have) dinner at that new restaurant on Friday.
I ___ (play) tennis with Jack next Saturday.
They ___ (travel) to Paris next week.
I ___ (give) a presentation at 10 AM tomorrow.
___ you ___ (do) anything this weekend?
We ___ (have) a meeting with the manager on Monday.
She ___ (go) to the concert tonight.
I ___ (have) my hair cut tomorrow afternoon.
They ___ (throw) a party for his birthday on Saturday.
I ___ (visit) my grandparents this Sunday.
What ___ you ___ (cook) for dinner tonight?
We ___ (drive) to the beach tomorrow morning.

passage.text: My schedule for next week is very busy. On Monday, I {{1}} (meet) my boss at 9 AM. On Tuesday, I {{2}} (fly) to Berlin for a conference. I {{3}} (stay) in a hotel near the airport. On Wednesday, I {{4}} (give) a speech about our new project. My colleague, John, {{5}} (join) me for lunch. On Thursday, we {{6}} (visit) our local office. I {{7}} (return) home on Friday evening. My wife {{8}} (pick) me up from the station. On Saturday, we {{9}} (have) dinner with our neighbors. We {{10}} (celebrate) their anniversary.

A: What {{1}} (you/do) tonight? B: I {{2}} (go) to the theater with Sarah. A: What time {{3}} (it/start)? B: At 7:30. We {{4}} (meet) outside the theater at 7:15. A: {{5}} (you/have) dinner before the show? B: No, we {{6}} (eat) afterwards. We {{7}} (go) to that Italian restaurant. A: That sounds nice. I {{8}} (stay) at home tonight. I {{9}} (finish) my book. B: Okay, I {{10}} (call) you tomorrow.

Next weekend {{1}} (be) very exciting. My friends and I {{2}} (go) camping. We {{3}} (leave) on Friday afternoon. We {{4}} (drive) to the mountains. My friend Tom {{5}} (bring) the tent. We {{6}} (spend) two nights there. On Saturday morning, we {{7}} (go) hiking. We {{8}} (cook) our food over a fire. We {{9}} (return) on Sunday evening. I {{10}} (take) many photos of the scenery.

I {{1}} (have) a very busy day tomorrow. First, I {{2}} (see) the doctor at 8 AM. Then, I {{3}} (meet) a client for coffee. At noon, I {{4}} (have) lunch with my sister. We {{5}} (discuss) our holiday plans. In the afternoon, I {{6}} (go) to the gym. I {{7}} (play) squash with a friend at 5 PM. In the evening, I {{8}} (attend) a cooking class. I {{9}} (learn) how to make sushi. I {{10}} (get) home around 9 PM.

Our company {{1}} (organize) a big event next month. We {{2}} (invite) over 200 guests. The event {{3}} (take) place in a luxury hotel. We {{4}} (have) a gala dinner on the first night. Several famous speakers {{5}} (give) presentations. We {{6}} (provide) transport for all the guests. My team {{7}} (manage) the registration desk. We {{8}} (work) very hard to make it a success. I {{9}} (meet) the hotel manager tomorrow to finalize the details. We {{10}} (start) the preparations early.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả lịch trình của bạn cho ngày mai (bạn có những cuộc hẹn nào, bạn sẽ gặp ai, ở đâu và lúc mấy giờ).
writing_prompts.example: Tomorrow is going to be a very busy day for me because I am meeting my new client at 9 AM in a coffee shop downtown. After that, I am seeing my dentist for a check-up at 11 AM and then I am having lunch with my colleagues at noon.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một sự kiện hoặc bữa tiệc mà bạn đã lên kế hoạch cùng bạn bè vào cuối tuần này (đó là sự kiện gì, các bạn đã chuẩn bị những gì và bạn mong đợi điều gì).
writing_prompts.example: This weekend, my friends and I are having a small party to celebrate my best friend's birthday at his house. We are meeting at 6 PM and I am bringing some snacks and drinks while another friend is organizing the music and games. I am very excited about it.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một chuyến đi công tác hoặc một chuyến du lịch mà bạn đã đặt vé và lên kế hoạch chi tiết (bạn sẽ đi đâu, bằng phương tiện gì và bạn sẽ ở đó bao lâu).
writing_prompts.example: Next week, I am flying to Singapore for a three-day business trip and I am staying at a hotel near the city center. I already have the flight tickets and I am travelling by taxi from the airport to my hotel. I have planned several meetings with our partners there.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một buổi tối hẹn hò hoặc gặp gỡ người thân mà bạn đã chốt thời gian và địa điểm (bạn sẽ làm gì, gặp ai và không khí bạn mong đợi ra sao).
writing_prompts.example: Tonight, I am going out for dinner with my family at a traditional Vietnamese restaurant to celebrate my mother's promotion. We are meeting there at 7 PM and I am really looking forward to spending quality time together in a warm and cozy atmosphere.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một khóa học hoặc một hoạt động ngoại khóa mà bạn sẽ bắt đầu tham gia vào tuần tới (đó là hoạt động gì, diễn ra ở đâu và bạn hy vọng học được gì).
writing_prompts.example: Next Monday, I am starting a new photography course at the local community center and I am attending classes every Monday and Wednesday evening. I hope to learn how to take professional photos and improve my editing skills. I am very enthusiastic about this new hobby.

elementary.title: A2 Review of all verb tenses A2
elementary.content:
📌 Tổng hợp các thì A2
• Present Simple: Thói quen, sự thật hiển nhiên.
• Present Continuous: Đang diễn ra, kế hoạch tương lai.
• Past Simple: Đã kết thúc trong quá khứ.
• Past Continuous: Đang diễn ra tại một thời điểm trong quá khứ.
• Present Perfect: Kinh nghiệm, hành động vừa mới xảy ra.
• Future (Will/Be going to): Dự đoán, dự định.

exercises.q: A: What ___? B: I'm a teacher.
exercises.opts: do you do,did you do,are you doing,have you done

exercises.q: I ___ at the moment. I'm looking for a job.
exercises.opts: am not working,don't work,haven't worked,didn't work

exercises.q: How many people ___ to the party last Saturday?
I ___ at home last night while they were at the party.
What ___ tonight? Do you have any plans?
exercises.opts: are you cooking,will you cook,do you cook,did you cook

exercises.q: I don't know yet. I ___ what's in the fridge.
John ___ very strangely these days.
I ___ him later to see if he's alright.
A: Are you going to eat that cake? B: No, I'm full. A: I ___ it then.
___ the contract for Mr. Scott yet?
exercises.opts: Have you written,Did you write,Do you write,Are you writing

exercises.q: Yes, I ___ it last night.
___ in bed when I called you yesterday?
exercises.opts: Were you,Have you been,Were you being,Are you

exercises.q: No, I ___ on the computer.
exercises.exp: Past continuous for action in progress

exercises.q: Who ___ the next election in your opinion?
I have no idea, but I ___ this time.
When ___ the composition?
exercises.opts: did you finish,have you finished,were you finishing,do you finish

exercises.q: I ___ it yesterday while I was travelling home.
What time ___ work?
exercises.opts: do you finish,are you finishing,did you finish,have you finished

exercises.q: At 6. Ok, then I ___ you at 6:15.
I ___ to Paris three times in my life.
A: What ___ (you/do)? B: I'm a teacher.
I ___ (not/work) at the moment.
How many people ___ (go) to the party last Saturday?
I ___ (stay) at home last night.
What ___ (you/cook) tonight?
I ___ (check) what's in the fridge now.
John ___ (behave) very strangely these days.
I ___ (call) him later.
I ___ (eat) it then.
___ (you/write) the contract yet?
Yes, I ___ (do) it last night.
___ (you/be) in bed when I called?
No, I ___ (work) on the computer.
Who ___ (win) the next election?
I ___ (vote) this time.
When ___ (you/finish) the composition?
I ___ (do) it yesterday.
What time ___ (you/finish) work?
I ___ (call) you at 6:15.
I ___ (never/be) to Paris.

reorder.words: What do you do for a living ?
I am not working at the moment
How many people went to the party ?
I stayed at home last night
What are you cooking for dinner tonight ?
I will check what is in the fridge
John is behaving very strangely these days
I am calling him later today
I will eat the cake then
Have you written the contract yet ?
I did it late last night
Were you in bed when I called ?
I was working on the computer
Who will win the next election ?
I am going to vote this time
When did you finish the composition ?
I did it yesterday afternoon
What time do you finish work ?
I will call you at six fifteen
I have never been to Paris before

passage.text: I {{1}} (be) a student at the moment. I {{2}} (study) English for three years. Last year, I {{3}} (go) to London for a summer course. While I {{4}} (stay) there, I {{5}} (meet) many people from different countries. We {{6}} (have) a great time together. Next year, I {{7}} (apply) for a university in the USA. I think it {{8}} (be) a difficult process, but I {{9}} (work) hard to achieve my goal. I {{10}} (never/be) to America before.

Yesterday, my friend Sarah {{1}} (call) me while I {{2}} (cook) dinner. She {{3}} (tell) me that she {{4}} (just/buy) a new car. She {{5}} (be) very happy because she {{6}} (save) money for a long time. We {{7}} (meet) tomorrow to see the car. I {{8}} (bring) some snacks. I think we {{9}} (have) a lot of fun. I {{10}} (not/see) her for two weeks.

Every morning, I {{1}} (wake up) at 7 AM. I {{2}} (have) breakfast and then I {{3}} (go) to work. I {{4}} (work) as a designer for five years. At the moment, I {{5}} (design) a new website for a client. Yesterday, I {{6}} (finish) the first draft. While I {{7}} (work), my boss {{8}} (come) in and {{9}} (say) it was great. I {{10}} (be) very proud of my work.

A: {{1}} (you/ever/be) to Italy? B: Yes, I {{2}} (go) there last summer. A: What {{3}} (you/do) there? B: I {{4}} (visit) Rome and Florence. While I {{5}} (be) in Rome, I {{6}} (eat) the best pizza ever. A: I {{7}} (go) to Italy next year. B: Really? I think you {{8}} (love) it. A: I {{9}} (start) learning Italian soon. B: That {{10}} (be) a great idea!

Last night, I {{1}} (watch) a movie when the power {{2}} (go) out. I {{3}} (not/can) see anything. I {{4}} (find) a candle and {{5}} (light) it. I {{6}} (wait) for an hour, but the lights {{7}} (not/come) back on. So, I {{8}} (decide) to go to sleep. This morning, everything {{9}} (be) back to normal. I {{10}} (finish) the movie tonight.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một ngày bình thường của bạn và so sánh nó với một ngày đặc biệt trong quá khứ (bạn thường làm gì và ngày đặc biệt đó đã diễn ra như thế nào).
writing_prompts.example: I usually wake up at 7 AM and go to work every day, but last year on my birthday, I took a day off and went to the beach with my friends. It was a very special day because we played games and had a wonderful barbecue until late at night.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một trải nghiệm thú vị mà bạn đã từng có và kế hoạch của bạn để lặp lại trải nghiệm đó trong tương lai (bạn đã làm gì và bạn định làm lại khi nào).
writing_prompts.example: I have been to Sapa once and I absolutely loved the beautiful mountains and the friendly local people. I am going to return there next winter because I want to see the snow and experience the cold weather again with my family.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy kể về một sự việc đang diễn ra trong cuộc sống của bạn hiện tại và nó đã thay đổi như thế nào so với vài năm trước (công việc, học tập hoặc sở thích).
writing_prompts.example: At the moment, I am working as a software engineer in a big company, which is very different from five years ago when I was still a student. My life has changed a lot because I have more responsibilities now, but I am also earning more money.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy mô tả một tình huống mà bạn đang làm một việc gì đó thì có một sự việc khác xảy ra (bạn đang làm gì, điều gì đã xảy ra và bạn đã làm gì tiếp theo).
writing_prompts.example: I was walking home yesterday evening when I suddenly saw an old man who needed help with his heavy bags. I stopped to help him carry them to his house, and he was very grateful for my kindness. It made me feel very happy.

writing_prompts.vi: Hãy nói về những dự định của bạn trong 5 năm tới và những gì bạn đã đạt được cho đến thời điểm hiện tại (bạn đã làm được gì và bạn muốn đạt được gì tiếp theo).
writing_prompts.example: So far, I have achieved my goal of graduating from university with a good degree and finding a stable job. In the next five years, I will work hard to become a manager and I am going to buy my own apartment in the city.
